description.value: Price 8,165 gp; Slot armor; CL 6th; Weight 30 lbs.; Aura moderate abjuration and transmutation DESCRIPTION This +2 hide armor is made from woolly mammoth hide. It seems to move with and bolster the wearer, and has only a â1 armor check penalty. Once per round, when the wearer makes a successful charge attack, the mammoth hide deals an additional 3d6 points of damage to the target. This damage isn’t multiplied on a critical hit or by effects that multiply the damage of a charge, such as Spirited Charge. Mammoth hide also protects the wearer from cold environments as the endure elements spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 4,165 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells bull’s strength, endure elements
